NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT NATURE'S ANSWER, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT - DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND PURSUANT TO CCP SEC. 430.10(E). THE COMPLAINT WAS NOT FILED WITHIN THE APPLICABLE ONE-YEAR STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. (CCP SEC. 340.) THE CAUSE OF ACTION ACCRUED ON JULY 18, 2012, THE FIRST DAY PLAINTIFF HAD THE RIGHT TO FILE SUIT AFTER SERVING THE 60 DAY NOTICE AND CERTIFICATE OF MERIT PURSUANT TO HEALTH & SAF. CODE SEC. 25249.7(D)(1). THE COMPLAINT WAS NOT FILED UNTIL OCTOBER 11, 2013, AND THEREFORE THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION IS TIME-BARRED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2014 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-07-2014 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. PHILIP THOMAS EMMONS APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. STACY E. DON OF THE TOLEDO DON LLP, TEL. NO. (916) 462-8950 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT
NATURES' ANSWER, INCORPORATED.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT NATURE'S ANSWER, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT - Defendant's demurrer to the second cause of action is sustained without leave to amend pursuant to CCP sec. 430.10(e). The complaint was not filed within the applicable one-year statute of limitations. (CCP sec. 340.) The cause of action accrued on July 18, 2012, the first day Plaintiff had the right to file suit after serving the 60 day notice and certificate of merit pursuant to Health & Saf. Code sec. 25249.7(d)(1). The complaint was not filed until October 11, 2013, and therefore the second cause of action is time-barred. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-07-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. PHILIP THOMAS EMMONS APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. STACY E. DON OF THE TOLEDO DON LLP, TEL. NO. (916) 462-8950 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT
NATURES' ANSWER, INCORPORATED.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT NATURE'S ANSWER, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is Denied as moot, in light of the ruling on demurrer. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/EHG
